problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: Combining Perovskite crystal structure optimization with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
